scripts.backend:dev: cd apps/backend && uv run langgraph dev --port 8123
scripts.backend:build: cd apps/backend && uv run langgraph build -t rerai-langgraph-api
scripts.backend:test: cd apps/backend && OPENROUTER_API_KEY=dummy uv run pytest -m "not live"
scripts.backend:lint: cd apps/backend && OPENROUTER_API_KEY=dummy uv run ruff check .
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,web,convex -c blue,green,magenta "bun run backend:dev" "bun run web:dev" "bun run convex:dev"
scripts.test: bun run backend:test && bun run web:build
scripts.build: bun run backend:build && bun run web:build
